title: Trace-Aware LSTM Model Checking for Safety-Critical Systems
authors: Chaker Nasri, Ahlem Ben Younes, Leila Ben Ayed
publish: 2025 International Conference on Research in Computing at Feminine (RIF)
abstract: This paper presents a hybrid verification methodology integrating NuSMV symbolic model checking with Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks to alleviate scalability limitations in safety-critical systems. Temporal execution traces from NuSMV are leveraged to train LSTMs for intelligent filtering and prioritization of system paths, reducing verification workload by nearly half.A case study on an aircraft landing gear controller evaluates the CTL property AG (gear_down → AF gear_locked). The dataset, derived from correct and faulty SMV models, trains and validates the LSTM, achieving high predictive accuracy (>98%) and a significant reduction in verification effort.Our pipeline contributes three key aspects: (i) explainable predictions for fault localization, (ii) automated patching for model correction, and (iii) visualization for interpretable verification outcomes. Limitations and future directions, including transformer-based models and additional safety-critical benchmarks, are discussed.
title_zh: 面向安全关键系统的追踪感知LSTM模型检测
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种混合验证方法，将NuSMV符号模型检测与长短期记忆（LSTM）网络相结合，以缓解安全关键系统中验证的可扩展性瓶颈。利用NuSMV生成的时间执行轨迹训练LSTM网络，实现对系统路径的智能筛选与优先级排序，使验证工作量减少近一半。以飞机起落架控制器为例，验证了CTL性质AG (gear_down → AF gear_locked)。基于正确与故障SMV模型生成的数据集用于训练和验证LSTM，取得了超过98%的高预测准确率，并显著降低了验证开销。本研究的流程在三个方面具有重要贡献：(i) 提供可解释的预测结果，支持故障定位；(ii) 实现模型修正的自动化补丁生成；(iii) 提供可视化功能，增强验证结果的可解释性。文章还讨论了当前方法的局限性及未来研究方向，包括采用基于Transformer的模型以及引入更多安全关键系统基准。

title: CAD Question Answering using Tool-Augmented Large Language Models
authors: Lufeng Wang, Ke Ke, Zhuo Song, Dehui Lu, Guozhong Cheng
publish: 2025 4th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence, Human-Computer Interaction and Robotics (AIHCIR)
abstract: Computer-Aided Design (CAD) is widely applied in both industrial and architectural design. Extracting information from CAD drawings is a fundamental upstream task; however, current practices mainly rely on manual visual inspection, where individuals search through dense textual and numerical data based on their own knowledge, resulting in low efficiency. To address this issue, this study proposes a CAD question-answering method based on large language models through prompt engineering and function calling. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves an answer accuracy of approximately 95%.
title_zh: 使用工具增强的大语言模型进行CAD问答
abstract_zh: 计算机辅助设计（CAD）在工业设计和建筑设计中得到了广泛应用。从CAD图纸中提取信息是上游的基础任务，但目前的实践主要依赖人工视觉检查，即依靠个人知识在密集的文本和数值数据中进行查找，效率较低。为解决这一问题，本研究提出了一种基于大语言模型的CAD问答方法，通过提示工程（prompt engineering）和函数调用实现。实验结果表明，所提出的方法答案准确率约为95%。

title: Text-to-SQL Generation for Medical Databases via Large Language Models and SQL Decomposition
authors: Yuanchen Ding, Fangjie Wan
publish: 2025 International Conference on Signal Processing and Communication Technology (SPCT)
abstract: To enhance the reliability and interpretability of medical database queries, this paper proposes a fragment-level self-consistent Text-to-SQL generation method based on large language models (LLMs) and SQL decomposition, specifically designed for integrated clinical and healthcare insurance databases. The method first employs an open-source code-centric LLM with a dual-path prompting strategy—Semantic Example Prompting and Question-Skeleton-based Prompting—to generate multiple candidate SQL queries. Subsequently, the candidate SQL statements are parsed into Abstract Syntax Trees (ASTs) using an SQL parser and uniformly transformed into JSON structures representing clause components. Frequency counting and normalization are performed on corresponding fragments across candidates to construct fragment-level self-consistency confidence scores. Finally, guided by a predefined SELECT syntactic skeleton, high-confidence fragments and database schema information are jointly fed into the LLM to generate a structurally constrained final SQL query, thereby mitigating local errors in multi-table joins and complex conditions. Experimental results on the self-constructed MedInsDB demonstrate that under identical open-source LLM configurations and training data, the proposed method significantly improves execution accuracy over several strong baselines, especially on hard cases involving multi-table joins.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型与SQL分解的医疗数据库文本到SQL生成
abstract_zh: 为提升医疗数据库查询的可靠性与可解释性，本文提出一种基于大语言模型（LLMs）与SQL分解的片段级自一致性文本转SQL生成方法，专门针对整合型临床与医疗保障数据库设计。该方法首先采用开源的以代码为中心的LLM，并结合双路径提示策略——语义示例提示（Semantic Example Prompting）与基于问题骨架的提示（Question-Skeleton-based Prompting），生成多个候选SQL查询。随后，利用SQL解析器将候选SQL语句解析为抽象语法树（AST），并统一转换为表示子句组件的JSON结构。通过对候选语句中对应片段进行频次统计与归一化处理，构建片段级自一致性置信度评分。最后，在预定义的SELECT语法骨架引导下，将高置信度片段与数据库模式信息共同输入LLM，生成结构受限的最终SQL查询，从而有效缓解多表连接与复杂条件中出现的局部错误。在自构建的MedInsDB数据集上的实验结果表明，在相同开源LLM配置与训练数据条件下，所提方法显著优于多个强基线模型，尤其在涉及多表连接的复杂查询任务中表现突出。

title: Generic and Domain-Specific AI-Powered Knowledge Graph Construction
authors: Irene Kilanioti, George Angelos Papadopoulos
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Knowledge Graph (ICKG)
abstract: Knowledge graphs are structured and interlinked formations that can enhance data expressiveness, as crucial data can be illustrated in a meaningful way that highlights the most significant and impactful affinities among them. In this work, we propose optimized AI-based construction of domain-specific and generic knowledge graphs, including datasets of specific unexplored domains, such as SDGs, and we work on various datasets to prove the generality of our findings, that outperform existent methods. CNN variations and various LLM models improve the performance and reduce training times for the constructed generic and domain-specific knowledge graphs and, hence, facilitate the work of practitioners, who collect and evaluate the data.
title_zh: 通用与领域特定的AI驱动知识图谱构建
abstract_zh: 知识图谱是一种结构化且相互关联的组织形式，能够增强数据的表达能力，使关键数据以有意义的方式呈现，突出它们之间最重要、最具影响力的关系。在本研究中，我们提出了一种基于优化人工智能的领域特定及通用知识图谱构建方法，涵盖特定未充分探索领域的数据集（如可持续发展目标SDGs），并通过多种数据集验证了我们方法的普适性，其性能优于现有方法。卷积神经网络（CNN）的变体以及多种大语言模型（LLM）的应用，显著提升了所构建的通用与领域特定知识图谱的性能，并缩短了训练时间，从而为数据收集与评估的实践者提供了有力支持。

title: Enhancing Integrated Circuit Design: Predictive Modeling and Interpretability in Complex Systems
authors: Wenyan Li
publish: 2025 5th International Conference on Computer Science, Electronic Information Engineering and Intelligent Control Technology (CEI)
abstract: The growing scale and complexity of integrated circuits demand more advanced design methodologies. This paper presents a data-driven framework, supported by machine learning techniques and feature engineering, which has shown strong potential in addressing these challenges. The generalized framework leverages predictive modeling to establish the relationship between design parameters and performance metrics. It is applicable to diverse circuits, including Power Amplifiers (PA), Receivers, and Transmitters. In addition, the framework emphasizes the integration of preprocessing, learning algorithms, and interpretability methods. Rather than focusing solely on prediction accuracy, the approach highlights the practical value of models. Furthermore, the underlying reasons for performance differences among models are analyzed and explained through SHAP analysis, enabling better understanding and more informed decision-making in the design process.
title_zh: 提升集成电路设计：复杂系统中的预测建模与可解释性
abstract_zh: 随着集成电路规模和复杂性的不断增长，对更先进的设计方法学提出了迫切需求。本文提出了一种数据驱动的框架，该框架依托机器学习技术和特征工程，展现出解决这些挑战的强大潜力。该通用框架利用预测建模技术，建立设计参数与性能指标之间的关系，适用于多种电路类型，包括功率放大器（PA）、接收机和发射机。此外，该框架强调预处理、学习算法与可解释性方法的集成。与仅关注预测准确率不同，该方法更注重模型的实际应用价值。同时，通过SHAP分析，深入剖析并解释了不同模型间性能差异的根本原因，从而促进对设计过程的深入理解，支持更明智的设计决策。

title: KG-Retriever: Efficient Knowledge Indexing for Retrieval-Augmented Large Language Models
authors: Weijie Chen, Ting Bai, Jinbo Su, Jian Luan, Wei Liu, Chuan Shi
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Knowledge Graph (ICKG)
abstract: Large language models with retrieval-augmented generation encounter a pivotal challenge in intricate retrieval tasks, e.g., multi-hop question answering, which requires the model to navigate across multiple documents and generate comprehensive responses based on fragmented information. Previous studies adopt iterative retrieval strategies to progressively collect relevant information across multiple documents, but they inevitably incur higher computational costs with multiple retrieval steps. To tackle this challenge, we introduce a novel Knowledge Graph-based RAG framework with a hierarchical knowledge retriever, termed KG-Retriever. The retrieval indexing in KG-Retriever is constructed on a hierarchical index graph that consists of a knowledge graph layer and a collaborative document layer. The associative nature of graph structures is fully utilized to strengthen intra-document and inter-document connectivity, thereby fundamentally alleviating the information fragmentation problem and meanwhile improving the retrieval efficiency in cross-document retrieval of LLMs. With the coarse-grained collaborative information from neighboring documents and concise information from the knowledge graph, KG-Retriever achieves marked improvements on five public QA datasets, showing the effectiveness and efficiency of our proposed RAG framework.
title_zh: KG-Retriever：用于检索增强型大语言模型的高效知识索引
abstract_zh: 具有检索增强生成能力的大规模语言模型在处理复杂检索任务时面临一个关键挑战，例如多跳问答任务，这类任务要求模型在多个文档之间进行导航，并基于分散的信息生成全面的回答。以往的研究采用迭代式检索策略，逐步从多个文档中收集相关信息，但这种策略不可避免地带来了较高的计算开销，因为需要多次执行检索操作。为应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种基于知识图谱的新型RAG框架——KG-Retriever，其核心是一个分层知识检索器。KG-Retriever的检索索引构建在一个分层索引图之上，该图包含知识图谱层与协同文档层。通过充分利用图结构的关联特性，KG-Retriever显著增强了文档内部及文档之间的连接性，从根本上缓解了信息碎片化问题，同时提升了大语言模型在跨文档检索中的效率。借助来自邻近文档的粗粒度协同信息以及知识图谱提供的简洁信息，KG-Retriever在五个公开的问答数据集上均取得了显著提升，充分验证了所提出的RAG框架在有效性与效率方面的优势。

title: Research on Agent-Based Code Generation Intelligence Construction Using AgentGPT
authors: ZhiXiong Li, YanFeng Wang
publish: 2025 5th International Conference on Computer Science, Electronic Information Engineering and Intelligent Control Technology (CEI)
abstract: This paper designs and implements AgentGPT, an i ntelligent agent system based on OpenAI's GPT-4 model, aiming t o explore task automation and code generation mechanisms drive n by large language models. Adopting a frontend-backend separation architecture, the system integrates core modules including ta sk generation, scheduling, execution, and feedback. It can automa tically generate executable code based on natural language instru ctions and manage the entire process. Experimental results demo nstrate AgentGPT's high accuracy and stability in code generatio n tasks. It autonomously implements various algorithms includin g recursion, iteration, and dynamic programming, while exhibitin g self optimization and complexity analysis capabilities. These fin dings validate the feasibility and advantages of large language mo del-based agents in automated programming, providing technical references and development directions for subsequent research in multi-task scheduling optimization, reasoning efficiency enhance ment, knowledge augmentation, and multi-agent collaboration.
title_zh: 基于AgentGPT的智能体驱动代码生成技术研究
abstract_zh: 本文设计并实现了一个基于OpenAI GPT-4模型的智能代理系统AgentGPT，旨在探索由大语言模型驱动的任务自动化与代码生成机制。系统采用前后端分离的架构，集成了任务生成、调度、执行和反馈等核心模块，能够根据自然语言指令自动生成可执行代码，并全程管理任务流程。实验结果表明，AgentGPT在代码生成任务中表现出高准确率与高稳定性，可自主实现递归、迭代、动态规划等多种算法，同时具备自我优化与复杂度分析能力。这些成果验证了基于大语言模型的智能代理在自动化编程中的可行性与优势，为后续多任务调度优化、推理效率提升、知识增强以及多智能体协作等研究提供了技术参考与发展方向。

title: COSTAR: Cloud-Observed Safety and Trust-Aware Agentic Reasoning for Enterprise Workflows
authors: Sowjanya Pandruju
publish: 2025 International Conference on Applied Artificial Intelligence, Data Engineering and Sciences (ICAIDES)
abstract: Agentic AI systems are moving from lab demos to production use, yet reproducibility, observability, and policy conformance remain open problems. I present COSTAR, a cloud-observed, safety- and trust-aware agentic orchestration layer that couples a deliberative planner with a verified executor, instrumented end-to-end with standard traces and an immutable Action Ledger. COSTAR integrates with Amazon Bedrock Agents for tool-use and knowledge grounding while adding a dual-loop controller: a Deliberation Loop for plan generation and reflection, and an Execution Loop with policy checks, risk budgets, and rollback. I evaluate COSTAR on GAIA, AgentBench, and SWE-bench style tasks, plus enterprise workflows (ticket triage, CRM updates, cloud change requests). COSTAR improves task success under policy constraints while reducing unsafe actions and cost variance versus strong agentic baselines.
title_zh: COSTAR：基于云观测的安全与信任感知的代理推理技术，用于企业工作流
abstract_zh: 智能代理系统正从实验室演示迈向实际生产应用，但可复现性、可观测性以及政策合规性等问题仍待解决。我提出 COSTAR——一种基于云观测、具备安全与信任感知能力的智能代理编排层。COSTAR 将一个审慎规划器与一个经过验证的执行器相结合，并通过标准追踪和不可篡改的“操作日志”实现端到端的全面监控。COSTAR 可与 Amazon Bedrock Agents 集成，以支持工具调用和知识锚定，同时引入双环控制器：一个“审慎循环”用于生成计划并进行反思，一个“执行循环”则包含政策检查、风险预算控制和回滚机制。我们在 GAIA、AgentBench 和 SWE-bench 类型任务，以及企业级工作流（如工单分类、CRM 更新、云变更请求）上对 COSTAR 进行了评估。结果表明，COSTAR 在遵守政策约束的前提下显著提升了任务成功率，同时减少了不安全操作和成本波动，优于现有的强基准智能代理系统。

title: Research on Compilation Option Setting Method Based on Bayesian Optimization
authors: Leidong Zhao, Pingfei Cui, Kai Nie, Haoran Li, Mengyao Chen
publish: 2025 5th International Conference on Computer Science, Electronic Information Engineering and Intelligent Control Technology (CEI)
abstract: Selecting appropriate compilation options based on different program structures to enhance program execution efficiency remains a pivotal issue in the research of compilation optimization techniques. To address this challenge, we propose autoOPT, a compilation option selection method based on Bayesian optimization. This method constructs a surrogate model using random forests to characterize the mapping relationship between compilation option combinations and program execution efficiency. It selects the lower confidence bound as the acquisition function and designs a mechanism for dynamically adjusting the hyperparameter kappa, ensuring that the algorithm possesses high diversity exploration capabilities in the initial stage and can accelerate convergence to the optimal solution in the later stage. In the GCC8.3 compiler environment, extensive experiments were conducted on the PolyBench benchmark suite. The results show that compared to compiler -O3 optimization, autoOPT achieves a speedup of 1.10x on the x86 architecture platform, 1.67x on the Sunway 831 processor platform, and a speedup of <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$1.55 x$</tex> on the Sunway 3231 processor platform, validating the effectiveness and applicability of autoOPT on both x86 and Sunway architectures. The autoOPT enhances the quality of selecting effective compilation optimization options and significantly boosts the program execution efficiency on high-performance computing platforms.
title_zh: 基于贝叶斯优化的编译选项设置方法研究
abstract_zh: 根据不同的程序结构选择合适的编译选项，以提升程序执行效率，仍是编译优化技术研究中的关键问题。为解决这一挑战，本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯优化的编译选项选择方法——autoOPT。该方法利用随机森林构建代理模型，刻画编译选项组合与程序执行效率之间的映射关系。采用下置信界（Lower Confidence Bound）作为采集函数，并设计了动态调整超参数 kappa 的机制，确保算法在初始阶段具备较强的探索多样性，后期则能加速收敛至最优解。在 GCC 8.3 编译器环境下，针对 PolyBench 基准测试套件进行了大量实验。结果表明，与编译器 -O3 优化相比，autoOPT 在 x86 架构平台上实现了 1.10 倍的加速比，在申威 831 处理器平台上实现了 1.67 倍的加速比，在申威 3231 处理器平台上实现了 1.55 倍的加速比，验证了 autoOPT 在 x86 与申威架构上的有效性与适用性。autoOPT 显著提升了有效编译优化选项的选择质量，大幅增强了高性能计算平台上的程序执行效率。

title: Improving Usability Augmented Reality With Code Complexity and Maintainability Index
authors: Hendriyana, Haryono Soeparno, Yulyani Arifin, Ford Lumban Gaol
publish: 2025 International Conference on Applied Artificial Intelligence, Data Engineering and Sciences (ICAIDES)
abstract: Education is a crucial role in improving students skills and competencies. Therefore, learning resources are needed that support and align with Sustainable Development Goal (SDG) 4: quality education. The fundamental areas of computer science is ability to recognize computer architecture and hardware, which allows implementation of immersive learning based Android called Kenal Hardware. However, the evaluation results of this application showed low interface usability (42.86%) and a high system error rate (24.49%). Consequently, this study measured software quality are internal and external quality. External quality is measured through direct user experience, while internal quality is measured using internal parameters such as code, code complexity, lines of code, and others. This study focused on code structure, using Cyclometric Complexity (CC) to calculate complexity, while the Maintainability Index (MI) is an indicator of the software’s maintainability. The research consisted of three stages: prefactoring, matrix refactoring, and revalidation. The result of internal quality improvements reduced error rate M1 (Marker Detection) 54.5% and in M2 (Interaction 3D Objects) 22.1%. Furthermore, improvements in M3 (Main Menu and User Interface) resulted in significant enhancements, which were implemented in new version of Kenal hardware.
title_zh: 提升增强现实的可用性：代码复杂度与可维护性指数
abstract_zh: 教育在提升学生技能与能力方面发挥着至关重要的作用。因此，需要开发与可持续发展目标（SDG）4——优质教育相契合的学习资源。计算机科学的基础领域之一是识别计算机架构与硬件的能力，这为基于沉浸式学习的Android应用“Kenal Hardware”的实现提供了支持。然而，该应用的评估结果显示，界面可用性较低（42.86%），系统错误率较高（24.49%）。因此，本研究对软件质量进行了内部与外部质量的测量。外部质量通过用户的直接体验进行评估，而内部质量则通过代码、代码复杂度、代码行数等内部参数进行衡量。本研究重点关注代码结构，采用环路复杂度（Cyclometric Complexity, CC）来计算复杂度，同时以可维护性指数（Maintainability Index, MI）作为衡量软件可维护性的指标。研究共分为三个阶段：预重构、矩阵重构和重新验证。内部质量改进的结果显示，M1（标记检测）的错误率降低了54.5%，M2（3D对象交互）的错误率降低了22.1%。此外，M3（主菜单与用户界面）的改进效果尤为显著，相关优化已应用于“Kenal Hardware”新版本中。

title: Hierarchical Reasoning and LoRa-Enhanced Large Model Framework for Root Cause Analysis in Distributed Systems
authors: Kangning Gao, Luyao Men, Zijun Zhou, Erdi Gao, Xinyue Huang, Junyi Zhang
publish: 2025 5th International Conference on Computer Science, Electronic Information Engineering and Intelligent Control Technology (CEI)
abstract: Root cause analysis in distributed systems is difficult because of the large amount of observability data, complex service dependencies, and the need for fast diagnosis. Traditional graph or statistical methods have low efficiency and poor generalization when they handle high-dimensional data. This paper presents QwenRCA, a hierarchical large-model framework built on the Qwen language model. QwenRCA uses temporal fault summarization, low-rank domain adaptation, structured reasoning, confidence-based routing, and safe automated repair generation. The model compresses multi-modal data into short representations, adjusts parameters through LoRA for domain learning, and routes inference between models of different sizes based on task difficulty and confidence. By combining simple reasoning and controlled automation, QwenRCA provides an efficient and interpretable solution for real-time fault localization and repair in distributed environments.
title_zh: 分布式系统根因分析的分层推理与LoRa增强型大模型框架
abstract_zh: 分布式系统中的根本原因分析（RCA）之所以困难，主要源于可观测数据量庞大、服务依赖关系复杂以及快速诊断的需求。传统的图方法或统计方法在处理高维数据时效率低下且泛化能力差。本文提出QwenRCA，这是一个基于Qwen语言模型构建的分层大模型框架。QwenRCA融合了时间故障摘要、低秩领域自适应、结构化推理、基于置信度的路由机制以及安全的自动化修复生成技术。该模型将多模态数据压缩为短小的表示形式，通过LoRA（低秩适配）调整参数以实现领域适应，并根据任务难度和置信度动态选择不同规模模型之间的推理路径。通过结合简单推理与受控自动化，QwenRCA为分布式环境中的实时故障定位与修复提供了一种高效且可解释的解决方案。

title: Translating Requirements into CARLA Executable Scripts: An LLM-Driven Automated Scenario Realization
authors: Shiyang Guan, Yijun Lu, Jati H. Husen, Haowei Cheng, Hironori Washizaki, Naoyasu Ubayashi, Nobukazu Yoshioka
abstract: Scenario-based testing is critical for ensuring the safety and robustness of autonomous driving (AD) systems, particularly in extreme scenarios such as heavy rain, pedestrian-involved crashes, and nighttime conditions. Our previous work integrated the CARLA simulator with the Multi-view Modeling Framework for ML Systems (M3S), facilitating scenario generation but still requiring substantial manual scripting. In this paper, we extend our framework by incorporating Large Language Models (LLMs) with M3S to automate scenario generation. Using a hierarchical prompt design, our approach extracts structured parameters from M3S descriptions into a JSON schema, which guides the LLM to generate accurate CARLA simulation scripts. Our evaluation demonstrates significant improvements in automation accuracy and efficiency, substantially reducing manual intervention and enhancing continuous testing cycles for AD systems.
title_zh: 将需求转化为CARLA可执行脚本：一种由大语言模型驱动的自动化场景实现方法
abstract_zh: 场景化测试对于确保自动驾驶（AD）系统的安全性和鲁棒性至关重要，尤其是在暴雨、行人碰撞以及夜间等极端场景下。我们之前的工作将CARLA仿真器与机器学习系统多视角建模框架（M3S）相结合，实现了场景生成，但仍需大量手动脚本编写。本文中，我们通过将大型语言模型（LLMs）与M3S框架集成，进一步扩展了该框架，以实现场景生成的自动化。通过采用分层提示设计，我们的方法从M3S描述中提取结构化参数，并将其转化为JSON模式，从而指导LLM生成准确的CARLA仿真脚本。评估结果表明，该方法在自动化准确性和效率方面均有显著提升，大幅减少了人工干预，显著增强了自动驾驶系统的持续测试能力。

title: Intelligent Ordered Escape Routing via Deep Reinforcement Learning and Hybrid Heuristics
authors: Linfeng Zeng, Xiaoyu Liang, Ning Xu, Qingjia Chi, Jiaojiao Yu, Yongkang Cai
publish: 2025 5th International Conference on Computer Science, Electronic Information Engineering and Intelligent Control Technology (CEI)
abstract: This paper proposes an ordered escape routing method based on deep reinforcement learning (DRL), aiming to address the efficient connection between pins and external circuits in high-density printed circuit board (PCB) designs. Escape routing is a critical step in PCB design, especially when dealing with dense pin arrays and limited routing space, where traditional methods often struggle to meet the requirements of routing success rate and signal integrity. In this work, the ordered escape routing problem is formulated as a Markov Decision Process (MDP), and the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm is employed to optimize the selection of routing endpoints. Specifically, we design a DRL model capable of predicting escape endpoints and develop a hybrid algorithm that integrates the artificial potential field method with the <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathrm{A}^{\ast}$</tex> algorithm. To address the challenging issue of routing order, a Simulated Annealing (SA) algorithm is also incorporated to guide and enhance the learning process, enabling the agent to discover optimal routing strategies under complex constraints. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed DRL-based approach significantly improves routing success rate, total wire length, signal integrity, and computational efficiency compared to traditional heuristic algorithms and Simulated Annealing algorithms. For instance, in our benchmark cases, a <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{1 0 0 \%}$</tex> routing success rate was achieved, along with notable reductions in total routing length. This study provides an innovative escape routing solution for high-density PCB designs and offers new insights into the application of deep reinforcement learning in electronic design automation (EDA).
title_zh: 基于深度强化学习与混合启发式的智能有序布线逃生方法
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的有序逃逸布线方法，旨在解决高密度印刷电路板（PCB）设计中引脚与外部电路之间高效连接的问题。逃逸布线是PCB设计中的关键步骤，尤其在面对密集引脚阵列和有限布线空间时，传统方法往往难以满足布线成功率和信号完整性的要求。本文将有序逃逸布线问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并采用近端策略优化（PPO）算法来优化布线终点的选择。具体而言，我们设计了一种能够预测逃逸终点的DRL模型，并提出一种融合人工势场法与A*算法的混合算法。为应对布线顺序这一复杂挑战，本文还引入了模拟退火（SA）算法，以指导并增强学习过程，使智能体能够在复杂约束条件下发现最优布线策略。实验结果表明，所提出的基于DRL的方法在布线成功率、总布线长度、信号完整性以及计算效率方面均显著优于传统启发式算法和模拟退火算法。例如，在基准测试案例中，实现了100%的布线成功率，同时大幅减少了总布线长度。本研究为高密度PCB设计提供了创新的逃逸布线解决方案，并为深度强化学习在电子设计自动化（EDA）领域的应用提供了新的思路与见解。

title: Research on Multidimensional Application of Machine Learning in Software Engineering
authors: Haoxuan Zou, Laichao Qu
publish: 2025 International Conference on Signal Processing and Communication Technology (SPCT)
abstract: In the context of rapid advancements in big data and artificial intelligence, machine learning has found extensive use in software engineering, as well as in fields like data analysis and image recognition. By enabling data acquisition, pattern discovery, and the construction of predictive models, machine learning significantly improves both the efficiency and quality of software development processes, while also driving innovation across multiple sectors. This paper begins by reviewing fundamental machine learning concepts, including major paradigms such as supervised and unsupervised learning, along with standard evaluation techniques like the holdout and cross-validation approaches. Subsequently, it focuses on the practical integration of machine learning within software engineering. The primary objective is to effectively apply machine learning techniques to streamline development workflows and enhance overall productivity.
title_zh: 机器学习在软件工程中的多维度应用研究
abstract_zh: 在大数据和人工智能技术迅猛发展的背景下，机器学习已广泛应用于软件工程、数据分析、图像识别等多个领域。通过实现数据获取、模式发现以及预测模型的构建，机器学习显著提升了软件开发过程的效率与质量，同时推动了多个行业的创新。本文首先回顾了机器学习的基本概念，包括监督学习与无监督学习等主要范式，以及留出法和交叉验证等标准评估技术。随后，重点探讨了机器学习在软件工程中的实际应用。其主要目标是有效运用机器学习技术，优化开发流程，提升整体生产力。

title: Design of Cybersecurity Knowledge Graph Systems Based on Large Language Models
authors: Yichun Li, Fei Xiong
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Knowledge Graph (ICKG)
abstract: In cybersecurity analysis, existing intrusion detection techniques can identify attack behaviors but fail to provide deep contextual information such as exploited vulnerabilities, attack techniques, and defense strategies. Traditional entity recognition and relation extraction methods are difficult to apply directly due to the high sparsity and specialization of cybersecurity domain entity relationships, limiting deep analysis capabilities. To address this problem, this paper proposes a large language model-based cybersecurity knowledge graph construction method. The method adopts a three-stage architecture. The first stage constructs a cybersecurity domain ontology framework and establishes a large model-driven entity relation extraction method, utilizing knowledge extraction capabilities, chain-of-thought learning, and in-context learning of large language models, combined with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to achieve precise extraction of specialized cybersecurity entity relationships. The second stage stores extracted triplet relationships into a graph database to construct a structured cybersecurity knowledge graph, enabling efficient management of security data. The third stage designs a front-end and back-end separated visualization system that displays the knowledge graph through a graphical interface and supports interactive query and analysis. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can effectively extract cybersecurity entity relationships, and the constructed knowledge graph provides comprehensive support for security personnel in attack attribution, vulnerability correlation, and defense strategy formulation.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的网络安全知识图谱系统设计
abstract_zh: 在网络安全分析中，现有的入侵检测技术虽然能够识别攻击行为，但难以提供诸如被利用漏洞、攻击技术及防御策略等深层次的上下文信息。传统实体识别与关系抽取方法因网络安全领域实体关系具有高度稀疏性和专业性，难以直接应用，从而限制了深度分析能力。为解决这一问题，本文提出一种基于大语言模型的网络安全知识图谱构建方法。该方法采用三阶段架构：第一阶段构建网络安全领域本体框架，并建立大模型驱动的实体关系抽取方法，充分利用大语言模型的知识抽取能力、思维链学习（chain-of-thought learning）以及上下文学习（in-context learning）机制，结合检索增强生成（Retrieval-Augmented Generation, RAG），实现对专业网络安全实体关系的精准提取；第二阶段将抽取得到的三元组关系存储至图数据库，构建结构化的网络安全知识图谱，实现安全数据的高效管理；第三阶段设计前后端分离的可视化系统，通过图形化界面展示知识图谱，并支持交互式查询与分析。实验结果表明，所提方法能够有效提取网络安全实体关系，构建的知识图谱为安全人员在攻击溯源、漏洞关联分析及防御策略制定等方面提供了全面支持。

title: An Intelligent Proofreading Framework for Structured Official Documents Based on Large Language Models
authors: Junyi Zhu, Jiajun He, Chaoyan Zhu
publish: 2025 4th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence, Human-Computer Interaction and Robotics (AIHCIR)
abstract: Traditional proofreading of official documents struggles to meet modern office requirements for semantic accuracy, format compliance, and efficiency. To address this challenge, this paper presents an intelligent proofreading framework that integrates fine-tuned large language models with LangChain workflow orchestration, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for knowledge enhancement, TF-IDF semantic matching, and rule- and terminology-based validation. A domain-specific corpus was constructed from high-quality institutional texts, and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) was applied for efficient model tuning. Experimental results show that the proposed framework outperforms mainstream models such as ChatGPT-4, DeepSeek, DouBao, and Qwen3-32B, achieving an average correction accuracy above 80%, an over-correction rate below 10%, and a 30% reduction in response time, while maintaining a Stability Index over 0.9. These results demonstrate that combining knowledge enhancement with rule constraints effectively improves the robustness and reliability of large language models for intelligent official document proofreading.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的结构化官方文件智能校对框架
abstract_zh: 传统公文校对难以满足现代办公对语义准确性、格式合规性及效率的高要求。为应对这一挑战，本文提出了一种智能校对框架，该框架融合了微调后的大型语言模型与LangChain工作流编排、基于检索增强生成（RAG）的知识增强技术、TF-IDF语义匹配方法，以及基于规则和术语的校验机制。研究基于高质量机构文本构建了领域专用语料库，并采用低秩适应（LoRA）技术实现高效模型调优。实验结果表明，所提出的框架在性能上优于主流模型如ChatGPT-4、DeepSeek、DouBao和Qwen3-32B，平均纠错准确率超过80%，误校率低于10%，响应时间减少30%，同时保持稳定性指数高于0.9。结果表明，将知识增强与规则约束相结合，能有效提升大语言模型在智能公文校对任务中的鲁棒性与可靠性。

title: A Hardware/Software Co-Optimization of HQC Using Tightly-Coupled Accelerators on a 32-bit Ibex Core
authors: Seog Chung Seo, YoungBeom Kim
publish: IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems II: Express Briefs
abstract: We present Hardware/Software co-optimization of Hamming Quasi-Cyclic (HQC) enabled by tightly coupled accelerators implemented on a 32-bit Ibex RISC-V core. On the hardware side, we propose a unified multiplier capable of efficiently performing carryless multiplication for both polynomial multiplication over F2[X]/(Xn−1) and multiplication over F28. We also design a Keccak permutation accelerator to support efficient randomness sampling. On the software side, we identify the optimal combination of Toom–Cook and Karatsuba methods for efficient polynomial multiplication on the Ibex core and enhance its performance by minimizing the number of memory accesses during its execution.With our co-optimization strategies, our HQC implementation achieves a performance improvement of several tens of times over the reference implementation.
title_zh: 基于32位Ibex核心的紧密耦合加速器实现HQCD的软硬件协同优化
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种由紧密耦合加速器支持的汉明准循环（HQC）硬件/软件协同优化方案，该方案基于32位Ibex RISC-V核心实现。在硬件方面，我们设计了一种统一的乘法器，能够高效执行两种类型的乘法运算：在域F₂[X]/(Xⁿ−1)上的多项式乘法（无进位乘法）以及在域F₂⁸上的乘法运算。此外，我们还设计了一个Keccak置换加速器，以支持高效的随机数采样。在软件方面，我们识别出在Ibex核心上实现高效多项式乘法的最佳组合方法——Toom–Cook与Karatsuba算法的结合，并通过减少执行过程中的内存访问次数进一步提升了性能。通过上述协同优化策略，我们的HQC实现相比参考实现获得了数十倍的性能提升。

title: Software Vulnerability Detection Method of Hybrid Neural Network
authors: Jianfei Shen, JinZe Li
publish: 2025 4th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence, Human-Computer Interaction and Robotics (AIHCIR)
abstract: With the continuous growth of software system scale and complexity, software security issues have become a critical bottleneck constraining the development of information technology. Traditional vulnerability detection techniques, which rely on manual rules and struggle to capture complex code semantics, fail to meet the automated security audit demands of massive code in modern software engineering. This paper proposes a hybrid deep learning architecture integrating Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory (Bi-LSTM) and Multi-Scale Convolutional Neural Network (MS-CNN) for source code vulnerability detection. The model constructs a joint representation space for code semantics and syntax structure, combined with a gated attention mechanism to dynamically focus on critical vulnerability patterns. Through code slicing preprocessing based on Abstract Syntax Tree (AST), source code is transformed into context-embedded token sequences. The model adopts a hierarchical feature fusion strategy. Bi-LSTM captures long-distance dependencies across function calls, MS-CNN extracts local syntactic patterns and an adaptive attention mechanism weights critical code fragments. Experiments on a hybrid dataset (integrating SARD benchmark and NVD real-world vulnerabilities) containing 124,249 samples demonstrate that the model achieves 97% detection accuracy on the test set, with an F1 score 26.4 percentage points higher than traditional static analysis tools (Checkmarx). Further analysis of attention weight visualization confirms the model's ability to locate sensitive code fragments containing vulnerabilities. This study provides theoretical support for building an intelligent and interpretable vulnerability detection system, demonstrating significant practical value in DevSecOps practices.
title_zh: 混合神经网络的软件漏洞检测方法
abstract_zh: 随着软件系统规模与复杂性的持续增长，软件安全问题已成为制约信息技术发展的关键瓶颈。传统漏洞检测技术依赖人工规则，难以捕捉复杂的代码语义，无法满足现代软件工程中大规模代码自动化安全审计的需求。本文提出一种融合双向长短期记忆网络（Bi-LSTM）与多尺度卷积神经网络（MS-CNN）的混合深度学习架构，用于源代码漏洞检测。该模型构建了代码语义与语法结构的联合表示空间，并结合门控注意力机制，动态聚焦于关键漏洞模式。通过基于抽象语法树（AST）的代码切片预处理，源代码被转化为上下文嵌入的标记序列。模型采用分层特征融合策略：Bi-LSTM捕捉函数调用之间的长距离依赖关系，MS-CNN提取局部语法模式，自适应注意力机制则对关键代码片段进行加权。在包含124,249个样本的混合数据集（整合SARD基准数据与NVD真实漏洞数据）上的实验表明，该模型在测试集上达到97%的检测准确率，F1分数比传统静态分析工具Checkmarx高出26.4个百分点。进一步的注意力权重可视化分析证实，模型具备精确定位含漏洞敏感代码片段的能力。本研究为构建智能化、可解释的漏洞检测系统提供了理论支持，在DevSecOps实践中展现出显著的应用价值。

title: Hardware Computing Capabilities for Industrial Informatics Systems
authors: Inna Zhulkovska, Oleg Zhulkovskyi, Oleksandr Sadovoi, Yuliia Sokhina, Oksana Lebid, Hlib Vokhmianin
publish: 2024 IEEE 6th International Conference on Modern Electrical and Energy System (MEES)
abstract: Floating point computing is an important tool in industrial informatics for process control and monitoring, machine vision and image processing, data analysis, process simulation and modelling and decision-making based on precision computing. They enable you to solve complex problems and improve the efficiency and reliability of systems in industry. Increasing the accuracy of arithmetic operations by increasing the digit capacity of numbers is the primary means of performing rounding-critical calculations. As the result of the research the general formulas for calculation of the values of minimum and maximum normalized and subnormalized numbers and also for calculation of the maximum absolute rounding errors of the basic format numbers are received. The conducted research shows the abilities of modern general-purpose processors and compilers of high-level languages to support the formats of increased accuracy for increasing the efficiency of mathematical modeling in general.
title_zh: 工业信息系统的硬件计算能力
abstract_zh: 浮点计算是工业信息化中过程控制与监控、机器视觉与图像处理、数据分析、过程仿真与建模以及基于精确计算的决策制定等领域的关键工具。它使我们能够解决复杂问题，并提高工业系统在效率和可靠性方面的表现。通过增加数值的位数容量来提高算术运算的精度，是执行对舍入敏感计算的主要手段。本研究得出了一般性公式，用于计算基本格式下正规化数和非正规化数的最小值与最大值，以及基本格式数的最大绝对舍入误差。研究结果表明，现代通用处理器和高级语言编译器具备支持更高精度格式的能力，从而有助于提升数学建模的整体效率。

title: TLA2eBPF: Real-Time Protection for Kernel Memory Out-of-Bounds Security
authors: Zi Wang, Yuqing Lan
publish: 2025 5th International Conference on Computer Science, Electronic Information Engineering and Intelligent Control Technology (CEI)
abstract: Memory out-of-bounds (OOB) vulnerabilities in the Linux kernel threaten system integrity by enabling privilege escalation, information leakage, and arbitrary code execution. Formal verification techniques such as TLA+ can mathematically guarantee memory-safety invariants but cannot enforce runtime monitoring, whereas eBPF provides real-time kernel instrumentation but relies on manually crafted heuristic rules. This work presents TLA2eBPF, the first semantics-preserving framework that automatically converts TLA+ security specifications into executable eBPF monitoring code. We design (1) bidirectional semantic-mapping rules between TLA+ state machines and eBPF runtime states; (2) a TLAPS-based bisimulation proof system ensuring behavioral equivalence; and (3) an optimized eBPF runtime including cache acceleration, batched event delivery, and probabilistic sampling. Experiments on real CVEs and Syzkaller cases demonstrate 100% detection coverage, 0% false positives, and <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$<3.5 \%$</tex> runtime overhead, achieving both formal completeness and practical real-time protection.
title_zh: TLA2eBPF：针对内核内存越界安全的实时保护
abstract_zh: Linux内核中的内存越界（OOB）漏洞会威胁系统完整性，可能导致权限提升、信息泄露以及任意代码执行。形式化验证技术（如TLA+）能够数学上保证内存安全不变式，但无法实现运行时监控；而eBPF虽可提供实时内核探针能力，却依赖人工编写的启发式规则。本文提出TLA2eBPF，这是首个语义保持的框架，可将TLA+安全规范自动转换为可执行的eBPF监控代码。我们设计了：（1）TLA+状态机与eBPF运行时状态之间的双向语义映射规则；（2）基于TLAPS的双模拟证明系统，以确保行为等价性；（3）优化的eBPF运行时机制，包括缓存加速、批量事件分发以及概率采样。在真实CVE漏洞和Syzkaller测试案例上的实验表明，该方法实现了100%的漏洞检测覆盖率、0%的误报率，且运行时开销低于3.5%，在保证形式化完备性的同时，实现了实用的实时防护能力。
